Learn Gematria

Master gematria from the ground up. Our structured modules take you from the basics of Hebrew numerology to advanced interpretive techniques.

Module 1

Introduction to Gematria

Learn the basics of gematria and its historical significance.

Beginner10–15 min
Module 2

The Hebrew Alphabet as Numbers

Master the Hebrew alphabet and its numerical values.

Beginner12–18 min
Module 3

Gematria Systems Overview

Explore standard, reduced, ordinal, and other systems.

Intermediate15–20 min
Module 4

Advanced Techniques

Learn AtBash, Albam, and other advanced gematria ciphers.

Advanced20–30 min
Module 5

Torah Gematria

How gematria is used in interpreting the Torah.

Intermediate15–25 min
Module 6

Name Gematria

Calculate and interpret the gematria of names.

Beginner10–15 min
Module 7

Number Mysticism

The spiritual significance of numbers in Jewish tradition.

Intermediate15–20 min
Module 8

Practical Applications

Apply gematria to modern contexts and everyday use.

Beginner10–15 min
